title: ceriscoides kerrii
intro: Ceriscoides kerrii, also known as the Thai fire thyme or Thai wild basil, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Ceriscoides kerrii include reducing stress, improving digestion, and fighting off infections, due to its high antioxidant content. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or alcohol.
